segments.text: And as you'd expect, Ken's made it this far as a top competitor
segments.original_text: やっぱりケン選手もここまで勝ち上がっているプレイヤーですから

segments.text: There it is! There it is!

segments.original_text: うううううううううううううううう

full_text: Here we go, two players! And as you'd expect, Ken's made it this far as a top competitor There it is! There it is! Ohhhhhhh!
